changelog: PRD v1.1 gap-fill: BatteryTag horizontal battery tag component (9 states, charging icon)
PRD v1.1 §4.3.4: DeviceInfo detail page — Model/SN/Capacity/Battery Type/Charge+Output Power/Voltage/Frequency/Health/Cycles/Temp(°F)/Wifi
PRD v1.1 §4.3: Display Icon 8-option selector (PowerStation/Fridge/CPAP/Solar/AC/Server/Lighting/Plug) + color picker
PRD v1.1 §4.3: Danger Zone — Delete Device with 30-day recycle bin notice
PRD v1.1 §4.5.4: Push Notifications sub-page (Power Outage / Low Battery threshold / Solar Status / Quiet Hours / Email Digest)
PRD v1.1 §4.7.3: 4-step Onboarding flow (Welcome → Profile → Add Device → Done) with progress bar
PRD v1.1 §8.3: Data & Privacy page — JSON/CSV export, 30-day recycle bin, anonymous analytics toggle
T7+: Notification banner on DevicePage showing latest alarm with quick-link to /notifications
DevicePage list mode: BatteryTag replaces text SOC percentage (WCAG: ARIA label, ≥3:1 contrast)
